title: Dentist in Andheri West Mumbai | The Dental Bond
description: Premium dental care in Andheri West. Implants, cosmetic dentistry, Invisalign, root canal, pediatric care and painless treatments by an award-winning team. Book now.

                                                Care Geriatric Dentistry TMD (Jaw Pain) Case Study Gallery Blog +91 9892781987 Where Specialised Dentistry meets Customised Care Call Now Experience world-class dentistry in the heart of Mumbai. Our clinic is built on the philosophy of delivering exceptional, pain-free care through top-tier dental expertise. We meticulously select our clinicians for their world-class skills, meticulous attention to detail, and unwavering commitment to patient care. Since 2016, The Dental Bond has established a reputation as one of Mumbai's most respected dental practices. To accomplish this, we've assembled a team of top-tier dental professionals with unmatched expertise. Together, we deliver exceptional comprehensive dental care all under one location. Our flagship practice consistently earns annual accolades from the dental industry. Your browser does not support the video tag. Emergency Care Dental Implant Cosmetic Dentistry Orthodontic Dentistry Pediatric Dentistry Sedation Dentistry Dentistry for Pain We offer sophisticated, painless emergency dental care with advanced technology, in Lokhandwala, Andheri West, Mumbai. Our expert team is dedicated to providing swift, effective relief from dental pain, ensuring comfort and quality with every treatment. Rely on us for exceptional care when it matters most. Call Now A Painless, Permanent Solution As part of our complete treatments, we provide dental implants, a permanent and natural-looking option for lost teeth or a previously placed implant that has failed now. We believe that a treatment done right the first time around provides a lifelong and favourable prognosis. Our skilled staff, led by specialised dentists in India, uses cutting-edge technology to offer a comfortable and seamless experience. Dental implants not only improve the beauty of your smile, but they also increase functionality, allowing you to eat, speak, and smile confidently. Each implant is painstakingly designed to blend in with your natural teeth, ensuring a solid and stable foundation. Trust our expert professionals to restore your brilliant smile with accuracy and care with our premium dental implant services. Read More Beautiful Smile and Confidence We transform your smile with our advanced cosmetic dentistry services designed to give you a perfect, confident smile. Led by India’s top dentists, our expert team uses the latest technology and specialize in enhancing the appearance of your teeth through customized procedures. Veneers provide a flawless, natural look by covering imperfections, while our comprehensive smile makeover combines multiple treatments to achieve your perfect smile. For a brighter smile, our professional teeth whitening treatments effectively remove stains and discoloration.Each treatment is tailored to your unique features for natural and stunning results. Trust our professionals to craft your perfect smile, allowing you to smile, laugh, and be happy with confidence. Read More Aesthetic Alignment Achieve a straight, confident smile with our various orthodontic treatments. We offer traditional braces like the metal and ceramic ones along with more aesthetic options like lingual braces and cutting-edge clear aligners as well to correct misaligned teeth, overcrowding, and bite issues. Our practice is a Platinum Invisalign Provider as well.Our orthodontic solutions are tailored to your needs, providing discreet and comfortable options for both adults and children. Not only does our teeth alignment treatment enhance your smile, but it also promotes long-term dental health.Trust us for the perfect alignment, so you can radiate confidence every day. Read More Your Little Ones Matter At The Dental Bond, we offer specialized pediatric dentistry to ensure your child’s dental experience is comfortable and positive. Recognized as the best dentist for kids in Mumbai, our team is dedicated to providing gentle, pain-free care tailored specifically for children. Using advanced techniques, we create a welcoming environment that eases their dental anxiety and promotes healthy smiles. Trust us to care for your child’s teeth with expertise and compassion, making each visit fun, relaxed, and stress-free with lot of goodies to take home for your little one too. Read More Special Care for Anxious People Odontophobia or fear of dental pain is a very real thing. Sedation Dentistry is ideal for patients with dental anxiety, fear of pain, or those undergoing longer procedures, nitrous oxide helps you relax without losing consciousness.Our premium dental clinic offers sedation dentistry with nitrous oxide, commonly known as "laughing gas," to ensure a stress-free and comfortable dental experience.This safe and effective sedative is inhaled through a mask, offering quick relief from anxiety while keeping you calm and at ease. The effects wear off quickly, allowing you to resume normal activities soon after your appointment.Our flagship practice in Lokhandwala, Andheri, Mumbai is one of a few clinics that offers this highly underrated service in house. Read More World-Class Dental Care Our globally trained team of specialists deliver top-tier surgical, cosmetic and general dentistry, from basic oral hygiene and periodontal cleaning procedures to root canals and aesthetic fillings, from single implants to complex full mouth rehabilitation procedures ensuring care that meets international standards. A Team that listens and cares We believe that great care starts with understanding your unique needs and concerns. Our team of highly skilled professionals is dedicated to providing personalized attention, ensuring that every patient feels heard and valued. We take the time to listen to your dental goals, answer your questions, and address any fears or anxieties you may have,even before treatment starts. Technology Pioneers As one of Mumbai's leading tech-driven clinics, our advanced in-house technology like digital scanning, advanced 3D planning software, 3D CBCT machine allows us to deliver precision dentistry. Our investments ensure meticulous planning , prompt diagnosis and perfect results for treatments like teeth straightening, dental implants, and smile makeovers. With in-house CEREC and cutting-edge technology, we deliver single visit crowns from machine to mouth in under 40 minutes. Hence we save time and enhance accuracy for our patients. Comfort and Convenience Enjoy a soothing clinic atmosphere with modern amenities, flexible scheduling, and easy booking, ensuring a smooth and stress-free dental experience from start to finish.Our staff is well trained,welcoming, and provide excellent follow up service to all our patients. Hey! This is no ordinary clinic. Along with India's top dentists, Dr. Husain and Dr. Farhath, the staff at The Dental Bond in Mumbai is dedicated to making your visit as comfortable as possible. Our objective is to establish a comfortable atmosphere in our warm and welcoming workplace. Our style is intentionally designed to be non-clinical, with comfortable amenities that will make you feel right at home. We want to create an experience that goes beyond you. Stepping inside The Dental Bond is like entering a premium art gallery, with cutting-edge technology and art inspired by both classical and modern styles. You may relax by watching films on our enormous plasma-screen television or listening to soothing music. Our team of doctors, having worked in the United States, Switzerland, Denmark, and various parts of Asia, brings a global perspective to our dental treatments. What people are talking about us Our reputation for dentistry excellence extends beyond India to the entire world. But don't just take our word for it — read our reviews. 500 + Reviews 4.9 V Veronica Barreto I recently got my treatment done from The Dental Bond, I am very happy with my treatment, they have done fantastic job. I didn't feel any pain while my treatment was going on. They are very punctual with timing, I want to thank Dr Husain And team for the wonderful job. Y Yash Shetty Had my root canal, crown restoration and cavity filling done by Dr Farhat & Dr Husain at The Dental Bond clinic. I was a bit timid about the initial procedure, considering my discomfort and infection, but both the doctors were very reassuring and answered all my questions patiently.The treatment was straightforward and flawless with minimum discomfort, most importantly eliminating the root cause. Clinic is well equipped with all the new gen facilities, including the in-house crown preparation. The staff is super friendly and could be easily reached out over a call/text in case of any issues throughout the day and any after care questions would be immediately routed to the doctors. I felt I was in great hands under care and would recommend everyone without any scepticism for a professional and top notch treatment.Thanks a ton to the entire team!!! Coloured Fillings Teeth Whitening Tooth Removal Others SUBMIT Testimonials Case Studies Kavina visited The Dental Bond last year, seeking a cosmetic enhancement for a more radiant smile. With expert care, specialists designed a personalized treatment plan, including advanced whitening and cosmetic contouring. The transformation was seamless, giving her the confident, picture-perfect smile she always desired. More Case Studies Krupa visited The Dental Bond for a full mouth reconstruction and underwent crown and bridge treatment by expert dentists. With a carefully planned approach, the procedure restored both function and aesthetics, giving her a beautifully renewed smile and the confidence to match. More Case Studies Nafeesa came to us hoping to fix her misaligned teeth. With expert care from Dr. Nimay and a dedicated braces journey, she now flaunts a fabulous, confident smile. More Case Studies Bhartiji visited The Dental Bond for a full mouth reconstruction and opted for implants to restore her smile. With expert planning and precision, the treatment provided a natural look and lasting functionality. Now, she beams with confidence, enjoying a beautiful and seamless transformation. More Case Studies Julya, one of our international patients, was unhappy with her smile when she first arrived. After meeting with Dr. Husain, she felt confident that a Smile Makeover would leave her with a stunning smile she could proudly show off. More Case Studies Anisa traveled from Kenya to The Dental Bond for a flawless smile transformation. Seeking a lasting solution, she opted for custom veneers crafted to perfection. The result? A radiant, natural-looking smile that enhanced her confidence instantly. More Case Studies Niharika lost her front tooth due to an injury, leading to an infection and bone loss. Seeking a natural smile, she visited The Dental Bond, where specialists performed implant and bone graft surgeries simultaneously. She received a temporary tooth the same day, boosting her confidence, which was later replaced with a full ceramic cap. More Case Studies One of our youngest patient Aaliyah came in with a very rare trouble. She did not have her two permanent teeth in the front. After meeting our specialist dentist Dr. Husain, she was convinced that she would be walking out with a smile to flaunt. More Case Studies Akansha Potdar came to The Dental Bond looking to achieve a perfectly aligned smile. After consulting with our orthodontic experts, she began her journey with teeth alignment treatment. The results have been transformative, giving Akansha a beautifully aligned smile and a boost of confidence she carries everywhere! More Case Studies Anurag, one of our valued patients, came to The Dental Bond looking to enhance his smile. After a detailed consultation with our experts, he opted for a Smile Makeover with veneers. The transformation was remarkable, leaving Anurag with a radiant, confident smile he’s proud to share with the world! More Case Studies Vivek Pathak visited The Dental Bond seeking a comprehensive solution to restore his smile and oral health. After a thorough consultation, he underwent a Tooth-Supported Full Mouth Reconstruction tailored to his needs. The results were life-changing, giving Vivek a beautifully restored smile and renewed confidence! More Case Studies Expert Team Dr. Husain Harianawala BDS, MDS- PROSTHODONTICS, ITI SCHOLAR- IMPLANTOLOGY Dr. Farhath Sayed BDS, MDS-ENDODONTICS, MICROSCOPIC DENTIST Dr. Nimai Sharad Joshi BDS, MDS-ORTHODONTICS, INVISALIGN SPECIALIST Dr. Kalpana Jangid BDS, AESTHETIC AND RESTORATIVE DENTIST Dr. Shifa Kalsekar BDS, MDS-PROSTHODONTICS Dr. Shruti Lad BDS, PREVENTIVE AND RESTORATIVE DENTIST Dr. Manveen Lamba BDS, AESTHETIC AND RESTORATIVE DENTIST Dr. Sonam Shah BDS, AESTHETIC AND RESTORATIVE DENTIST Z Business Sept 11, 2025 From Clinic to Community: How a power couple & their female-led dental team are building trust, one smile at a time Drs Farhath Sayed and Husain Harianawala of The Dental Bond in Mumbai offer transparent, empathetic, and technology-driven dental care with a female-led team...... Their clinic, The Dental Bond, combines two complementary specialties: saving teeth and replacing those beyond repair all under one roof...... Read More Navgujaratsamay Jul 14, 2025 પીડામુક્ત સ્મિત "ધી ડેન્ટલ બોન્ડ"થી શરૂ થાય છે : દરેક પેઢી માટે અનુકૂળ પીડારહિત હાઇ-ટેક ડેન્ટલ ટ્રીટમેન્ટ મુંબઈ [ભારત], 2 સપ્ટેમ્બર: હવે આધુનિક ડેન્ટલ ટ્રીટમેન્ટ(દંત ચિકિત્સા) ને ક્લિનિકલ કે ભયભીત કરનારી પદ્ધતિ સમજવાની જરૂર નથી. મુંબઇમાં અંધેરીના લોખંડવાલા એન્ક્લેવ ખાતે આવેલી "ધી ડેન્ટલ બોન્ડ" - ઇમ્પ્લાન્ટ અને માઇક્રો-ડેન્ટિસ્ટ્રી, એ અદ્યતન ટેકનોલોજી સાથેની એક દાયકાથી કાર્યરત અત્યાધુનિક ડેન્ટલ ક્લિનિક છે......
